hero.title: Justin
hero.description: Frontend Engineer dedicated to building high-performance web applications using Vue 3 and Nuxt.js. Expert in leveraging TypeScript for robust codebases and experienced in optimizing the full SDLC to ensure seamless product delivery.

portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.subtitle: Enterprise-grade solutions built with modern frontend technologies

project0.title: SOK Enterprise Master
project0.description: An integrated enterprise management platform combining 104 Job Bank's Business Master service with organizational analytics and chart visualization, empowering HR teams with talent data analysis, org structure visualization, and data-driven recruitment strategy — enhancing overall HR decision-making efficiency.

project1.title: EMS Exhibition Management Platform
project1.description: A modern exhibition management platform integrating event registration, venue scheduling, exhibitor management, and analytics dashboards — significantly improving organizer efficiency and enhancing the exhibitor and attendee experience.

project2.title: EPOS Electronic Recall Petition System
project2.description: A high-security electronic petition platform developed for Taiwan's Central Election Commission, featuring strict identity verification, end-to-end data encryption, and anti-fraud mechanisms to ensure the legality, transparency, and integrity of the petition process in compliance with government cybersecurity standards.

project3.title: MAMP Medical Association Management Platform
project3.description: A comprehensive management system tailored for medical and academic associations, covering member data management, event registration, continuing education credit tracking, and bulletin publishing — effectively improving administrative efficiency and service quality.

project4.title: AMS Association Management System
project4.description: A full-featured association operations platform offering member management, dues collection, meeting records, and report exports. Designed to help organizations digitize daily administrative workflows and improve overall operational efficiency.

project5.title: Taiwan Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery Association Website
project5.description: Official website for a professional medical academic society, providing up-to-date medical information, academic event announcements, board member directories, and public health education resources — balancing professional credibility with user-friendly accessibility.

project6.title: CECW Central Election Commission Website Redesign
project6.description: Led a full modernization of the Central Election Commission's official website, introducing responsive design, SEO optimization, and frontend performance tuning, while strictly adhering to WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards to ensure the site is accessible and usable by all citizens.

project7.title: CEC Website Backend Admin Panel
project7.description: A content management system built alongside the CEC official website, supporting dynamic page editing, multimedia uploads, election information publishing, and role-based access control — enabling content administrators to update and maintain the site quickly and securely.

project8.title: MSP3 Fire Agency Messaging Platform Resilience Project
project8.description: A highly available emergency messaging platform built for Taiwan's National Fire Agency, leveraging containerized deployment to ensure system stability and fault tolerance under extreme conditions — safeguarding real-time communication needs for frontline rescue personnel and the public.

skills.title: Skills & Tools
skills.subtitle: Proficient across multiple tech stacks, from frontend development to backend fundamentals

job1.description: Led frontend development for multiple government agency and medical association projects, building high-quality enterprise web applications using Vue.js, Nuxt.js, Vite, Quasar, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. Responsibilities include system architecture design, technology selection, performance optimization, and cross-browser compatibility assurance.

job2.company: Institute for Information Industry (III) Training Program
job2.description: Completed an intensive full-stack development training program at III (Institute for Information Industry), building multiple end-to-end projects using JavaScript, Bootstrap, PHP, MySQL, Docker, and Git — establishing a solid foundation in software engineering principles and agile development practices.

job3.description: Oversaw the full lifecycle of ERP system implementation and custom development projects, including requirements gathering, functional specifications, development progress tracking, and client acceptance. Coordinated cross-departmental teams and external vendors to ensure on-time, on-quality delivery, accumulating extensive experience in software project management and client communication.
